name: The Grounds Driving Range & Pro Shop
address: King Par Plaza, 5140 Flushing Rd, Flushing, MI 48433
about: The Grounds Driving Range & Pro Shop is a family-owned facility in Flushing, Michigan, featuring a covered outdoor TrackMan driving range and an indoor TrackMan golf simulator. The venue is designed to help golfers of all skill levels improve their game through technology-driven practice and professional instruction. The pro shop offers a wide array of products, including bags, clubs, and accessories, along with club repair services. The facility combines traditional practice with advanced data analytics to provide a comprehensive golf training experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to free TrackMan technology on the driving range providing real-time shot data
State-of-the-art TrackMan simulator with precise ball and club tracking analytics
Clean, covered all-season practice facility protected from the elements
Wide selection of premium golf brands and club repair services

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned on website
No alcohol service mentioned on website

simulator_hardware.notes: High-tech simulator with dual ball and club tracking radar systems

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or test out new ones at their pro shop. They offer a wide selection of clubs and equipment for purchase.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is mentioned as being allowed. The venue focuses on golf practice and equipment.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With a TrackMan simulator, you can play 18 holes in approximately 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Grounds welcomes families and offers small, medium, and large buckets of balls suitable for golfers of all ages and skill levels.
